name: Odd Future
description:
“just admit, not only are we talented, we’re rad as fuck!”

oldie — odd future

hanging out with your friends at the odd future house!!

“characters” written into this bot: tyler the creator, domo genesis, taco, jasper dolphin, syd, left brain, nak-kel smith, hodgy, lionel, mike g, vince staples, lucas vercetti, earl sweatshirt, and frank ocean.

(i was too lazy to make everything accurate so they’re ALL 22 years old, besides earl who is 19)

♡♡♡

i’m usually not one to make bots of real people…..but this is mostly a comfort bot curated for me so it can either be a fluff or smut bot depending on how silly you are :,)

odd future..boom..idk if i’m just picky but i feel like ive never seen an odd future bot that genuinely includes EVERYONE and is somewhat what i’d consider “in character”.
creator: wolfgangyonkers
